content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON environment — Normal vol 26.5% with broad participation (Breadth: 7/8). Momentum favors cyclicals while banks lag.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Energy & Chemicals driving the tape: TUPRS (1W: +6.08% | 1M: +19.79%) ABOVE TREND and PETKM (1W: +12.31% | 1M: +3.34%) ABOVE TREND; Holding & Investment showing catch-up: DOHOL (1W: +4.79% | 1M: -3.23%) RECOVERY. Technology & Telecom also positive with KONTR (1W: +5.56% | 1M: -20.35%) RECOVERY.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Banking & Finance is the clear laggard: HALKB (1W: -16.84% | 1M: -19.28%) BELOW TREND and AKBNK (1W: -1.22% | 1M: -18.04%) BELOW TREND. Retail & Food has distribution risk despite flat 1W: ULKER (1W: -4.71% | 1M: -20.58%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
SASA (1W: +13.76% | 1M: -8.15%) RECOVERY, PETKM (1W: +12.31% | 1M: +3.34%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +8.98% | 1M: +1.45%) ABOVE TREND, BIMAS (1W: +6.80% | 1M: -3.46%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +6.08% | 1M: +19.79%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
HALKB (1W: -16.84% | 1M: -19.28%) BELOW TREND, SOKM (1W: -9.81% | 1M: -22.29%) BELOW TREND, VAKBN (1W: -9.28% | 1M: -22.89%) BELOW TREND, ULKER (1W: -4.71% | 1M: -20.58%) BELOW TREND, EKGYO (1W: -4.00% | 1M: -21.19%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
High short-term movers: SASA (1W: +13.76% | 1M: -8.15%) RECOVERY, PETKM (1W: +12.31% | 1M: +3.34%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +8.98% | 1M: +1.45%) ABOVE TREND — watch profit-taking and volume quality.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banks remain under pressure; AKBNK (1W: -1.22% | 1M: -18.04%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -1.32% | 1M: -16.60%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: +0.28% | 1M: -21.22%) RECOVERY, TSKB (1W: +5.20% | 1M: -14.02%) RECOVERY — exposure should be tactical and selective.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy industry mixed: EREGL (1W: -0.56% | 1M: -4.80%) BELOW TREND, TOASO (1W: +5.45% | 1M: -9.97%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: +0.47% | 1M: +6.04%) ABOVE TREND — favor names with capex visibility and order backlog.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Sector leadership intact: TUPRS (1W: +6.08% | 1M: +19.79%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +12.31% | 1M: +3.34%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +13.76% | 1M: -8.15%) RECOVERY; watch margins and feedstock moves for next-week catalysts.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Bias overweight cyclicals (Energy & Chemicals, selective Industrials/Transportation) and underweight large domestic banks; trim names showing stretched 1M gains and add high-conviction recoveries on weakness. Keep cash/light hedges for headline risk.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
TUPRS (1W: +6.08% | 1M: +19.79%) ABOVE TREND for continued momentum, PETKM (1W: +12.31% | 1M: +3.34%) ABOVE TREND for petrochemical catalysts, SASA (1W: +13.76% | 1M: -8.15%) RECOVERY for volatility play, HALKB (1W: -16.84% | 1M: -19.28%) BELOW TREND as a downside risk monitor.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Energy & Chemicals for earnings and margin surprises; Banking & Finance for sentiment-driven moves and potential downside; Transportation for demand recovery signals.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Monitor XU100 reaction around the nearest 50-day MA for confirmation of the risk-on move and the 1W VWAP for immediate bias; macro triggers: domestic rate guidance, CPI prints, and oil price swings will drive sector rotation.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Normal-volatility RISK-ON session with 7/8 sectors positive; Energy & Chemicals and select cyclicals lead while banks remain the weak link. Trade overweight cyclicals and selective recoveries, keep stops tight around headline-driven triggers.
